signals.message: M6 is the final launch milestone. All application code is complete (M3–M5 done). Your job: get seeneyu live on Vercel. Follow the M6 Deployment Runbook in your CLAUDE.md step by step. Use deployment-state.json to checkpoint progress. 4 env vars are needed before anything can run: DATABASE_URL+DIRECT_URL (Neon), YOUTUBE_API_KEY (Google Cloud), OPENAI_API_KEY (OpenAI), BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN (Vercel Blob). Important: do NOT commit .env.local to git. After deploy: run health checks, signal Tester with deploy URL for smoke tests, signal PM when M6 is complete.
signals.context: Read project-state.json for current blockers. Read milestones.json to confirm M0–M5 complete. The app is a Next.js 14 App Router project — Vercel will auto-detect the framework.
blockers_to_resolve: DATABASE_URL not set — create Neon project, run prisma db push
YOUTUBE_API_KEY not set — run roles/data-engineer/pipelines verify script
OPENAI_API_KEY not set — add from OpenAI platform
BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN not set — create Vercel Blob store

signals.message:
Resuming M6 deployment. Significant progress made — read ALL notes below before acting.

COMPLETED SO FAR:
1. npm install — done (459 packages)
2. prisma generate — done
3. Build errors fixed — TypeScript Prisma Json type cast (JSON.parse workaround), lazy OpenAI client init (getOpenAI() fn)
4. next.config.mjs — Vercel Blob image hostname added
5. package.json — postinstall: prisma generate added, verify script added
6. Git committed and pushed to: https://github.com/haidongkixot/seeneyu.git (branch: master)
7. Vercel project already linked (projectId: prj_d5GBBZRuoiyM5wteZAcIH8kKqMhW)
8. Vercel deploy succeeded — app is LIVE at: https://seeneyu.vercel.app
9. YOUTUBE_API_KEY — added to Vercel env vars via `vercel env add`

STILL NEEDED (user will provide values, add via `vercel env add <KEY> production`):
- DATABASE_URL (Neon pooled connection string)
- DIRECT_URL (Neon direct connection string)
- OPENAI_API_KEY
- BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN

ONCE ALL 4 ENV VARS ARE PROVIDED:
1. Add each to Vercel: echo "<value>" | vercel env add <KEY> production
2. Redeploy: vercel --prod --yes
3. Push schema: npm run db:push
4. Seed database: npm run db:seed
5. Verify seed: check https://seeneyu.vercel.app/library loads 15 clips
6. Signal Tester to run smoke tests on live URL
7. Signal PM that M6 is complete

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
- .env.local is gitignored — never commit it
- clips-seed.json has all 15 YouTube IDs already verified (no NEEDS_VERIFICATION entries)
- Build passes clean locally and on Vercel
- All 9 routes deploy successfully
- The app shows UI correctly but /library and /feedback pages will error until DATABASE_URL is set
